description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ruby:2.6.0 Docker image. Set a before_script that runs `gem install bundler -v 2.4.22`, `bundle config set --local path vendor/bundle`, and `bundle install`. Define a single job named pages in the deploy stage that executes `echo DEBUG_starting_script`, `bundle update`, and `bundle exec jekyll build -d public/`. Configure the job to publish the `public/` directory as a Pages artifact and to run only on the master branch.
